Speak Across Languages, Instantly

Connect with anyone, anywhere, in their language. Experience seamless real-time translated voice calls powered by cutting-edge AI.

Real-Time Translation
Accurate Transcription
Natural AI Voices

Experience the Future of Communication

WaveCall bridges language gaps with powerful, real-time AI voice translation technology.

Real-Time Translation

Break language barriers instantly. Communicate seamlessly as your voice is translated in real time.

Wide Language Support

Connect globally with support for numerous languages, powered by advanced AI models.

Accurate Live Transcription

See the conversation unfold with precise, real-time transcription of what's being said.

Natural AI Voices

Hear translations delivered in clear, natural-sounding AI voices for an effortless experience.

AI-Powered Core

Leverages state-of-the-art AI for transcription, translation, and text-to-speech.

Simple & Intuitive

Easy-to-use interface. Join a call, select your language, and start talking.

Secure Communication

Built on secure infrastructure to ensure your conversations remain private.

Dedicated Support

Need help? Our support team is available via email to assist you.

Simple & Accessible

Start Translating Today

Experience the core features of real-time voice translation. Get started easily and connect across languages.

Core Translation Features

  • Real-time Voice Translation
  • Live Transcription Display
  • Multiple Language Support
  • Natural AI Voice Playback

(Usage based on underlying AI service costs may apply in the future)

Answers to frequently asked questions about our real-time translation calls.
